alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services in global commercial operations and transformation programs; has designed, scaled, and led cross-functional operations initiatives.

Demonstrated expertise in transformation programs, process design, stakeholder management, and commercial operations scaling. Advanced Excel, Sheets, SQL, BigQuery, and Looker/Tableau for data analysis and reporting.
alignments.job_requirement: Operations and process support for GTM functions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaling global commercial operations and managing territory budgets via Salesforce administration; experience with CRM, forecasting, and revenue-leakage control.

gaps.gap: Title is 'Associate,' implying junior analyst or coordinator scope; job description is incomplete/cached and does not detail specific responsibilities, decision authority, or business impact.
gaps.mitigation: Request full unabridged JD. If true scope is junior operations execution (data entry, process compliance, meeting coordination), this is below-band and deprioritized per candidate guidelines. If scope is actually strategic operations or program leadership, re-evaluate.

gaps.gap: Candidate is L4–L5 (Manager/Senior Manager/Lead scope); estimated role is L3 (Associate/Coordinator). Seniority mismatch is significant.
gaps.mitigation: Confirm role is not a misclassified step-down or trial position. Verify if company is early-stage or has non-standard leveling.

gaps.gap: JD text is corrupted (Next.js React chunk dump); unable to extract explicit requirements, responsibilities, reporting line, or domain context (SaaS, enterprise AI, developer tools, etc.).
gaps.mitigation: Obtain clean, plain-text JD. Current submission is not evaluable.

output.level_rationale: Title "Associate" signals L3 (entry–L4 IC or coordinator scope). no years required, management scope, or reporting-line signals are visible in the role JSON. Company size/stage unknown. JD text is corrupted and unreadable, preventing standard anchoring signals. Low confidence.".
output.summary: GTM Operations Associate at Cognition (Singapore) is estimated at L3 based on title alone; candidate is L4–L5 (Manager/Senior Manager scope). JD text is corrupted (React chunk dump) and does not contain readable requirements, responsibilities, or scope. Without a clean JD and confirmation of actual business-ownership scope (strategy, transformation, program leadership vs. junior execution), this role cannot be fairly evaluated. Recommendation: obtain unabridged JD before proceeding.
uncertainties: JD is corrupted (Next.js React output); actual requirements and responsibilities are not readable.
Company size, stage, and GTM function complexity are not stated; Cognition brand suggests growth-stage AI company, but this is not confirmed in Role JSON.
Unknown whether 'Associate' is a true junior title or a company-specific leveling convention.
Unclear if role is pure operations execution (data, compliance, coordination) or strategic/program-ownership operations—two very different profiles.
